FERMAT use case: split testing educational/influencer-driven landing pages. Next steps: Raymond to re-sync Shopify data connector, send ClickFunnels page when ready, start using Pierre to build funnels. Isabel to share top-performing funnel examples, connect AR team with GiB accounting.
